resposta:
```python
class Solution:
    def flipLights(self, n: int, presses: int) -> int:
        return (1 << presses) % (n + 1)
```
solution:  
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(1)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: The solution utilizes bit manipulation to efficiently calculate the number of possible statuses.  It leverages the fact that each button press can be represented as a bit flip in a binary representation of the bulb states. The modulo operation ensures the result stays within the bounds of the number of bulbs.
